title: Playground Dev Run Ledger
concept: A table-led local development launcher for plugin developers that treats every saved site, temporary site, PR preview, GitHub import, Blueprint run, and zip transfer as a row in a dense development ledger with a contextual inspector and separate workbench surfaces.
focus: PR, GitHub, Blueprint, and zip starts
contextual run inspector instead of card onboarding
blue, green, and amber operational states
flows: Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from a development run ledger with rename, delete, save, local save, export, and continue actions
Start new runs from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import after account connection, Blueprint URL, imported zip, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery
Save temporary Playgrounds in browser storage or to a local directory with visible file-copy progress
Navigate the active WordPress path, refresh it, and open Homepage or WP Admin from the shell and Site Manager
Use Site Manager tabs for runtime settings, file browser, Blueprint editing, database tools, and logs
Move results through Export to GitHub, Download as .zip, Blueprint bundle download, database.sqlite download, GitHub import, zip import, and Blueprint URL import
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
